ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the brand entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the brand entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Brand ID to which the style belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the style entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the style entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing item (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the clothing item (e.g., S, M, L, XL, 2XL) */,
  "body_length" TEXT /* Body length measurement in inches */,
  "body_length_tolerance" TEXT /* Tolerance for body length measurement in inches */,
  "chest_width" TEXT /* Chest width measurement in inches (laid flat) */,
  "chest_tolerance" TEXT /* Tolerance for chest width measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement from center back in inches */,
  "sleeve_length_tolerance" TEXT /* Tolerance for sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_width" TEXT /* Shoulder width measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_width_tolerance" TEXT /* Tolerance for shoulder width measurement in inches */,
  "waist_width" TEXT /* Waist width measurement in inches */,
  "waist_width_tolerance" TEXT /* Tolerance for waist width measurement in inches */,
  "hip_width" TEXT /* Hip width measurement in inches */,
  "hip_width_tolerance" TEXT /* Tolerance for hip width measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_length" TEXT /* Inseam length measurement in inches (for bottoms) */,
  "inseam_length_tolerance" TEXT /* Tolerance for inseam length measurement in inches */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Language code (e.g., en, es, fr) */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP) */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Brand ID to which the measurement entry belongs */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Style ID to which the measurement entry belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the measurement entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the measurement entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)
